description: Verify production loop runs produce a hash-chained ledger, resumable checkpoints, typed handoff envelopes, and coordination decisions that can be replayed from recorded state.

command: set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cp -a agent-system "$tmp/agent-system"; cp -a scripts "$tmp/scripts"; export DIGITAL_OFFICE_SYSTEM_HOME="$tmp/agent-system"; export HERMES_HOME="$tmp"; office="$tmp/agent-system/bin/office-system"; "$office" loop-start --run-id replay-run --agent writer --task 'Write a source-backed outline for a product update.' > "$tmp/loop.json"; "$office" checkpoint-create --run-id replay-run --checkpoint-id cp1 --stage perceive --label 'perception checkpoint' --resume-cursor perceive:ready --state-json '{"facts":["input captured"]}' --artifact perception_report:ok > "$tmp/checkpoint.json"; "$office" handoff-create --run-id replay-run --handoff-id h1 --from-agent writer --to-agent researcher --stage plan --reason 'Need cited evidence before drafting.' --input-schema-json '{"required":["sources"]}' --context-json '{"topic":"product update"}' --artifact evidence_brief:pending --acceptance-criterion 'Researcher returns a cited source list.' > "$tmp/handoff.json"; "$office" coordination-plan --run-id replay-run --task 'Research three independent market examples in parallel.' --agent researcher --agent writer --parallelizable > "$tmp/coordination.json"; "$office" run-ledger-list --run-id replay-run > "$tmp/ledger.json"; "$office" checkpoint-list --run-id replay-run > "$tmp/checkpoints.json"; "$office" handoff-list --run-id replay-run > "$tmp/handoffs.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; ledger=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); events=ledger["events"]; names={e["event"] for e in events}; assert {"loop_start","checkpoint_created","handoff_created","coordination_plan_created"}.issubset(names); assert all(e.get("event_hash") for e in events); assert all("previous_event_hash" in e for e in events); checkpoints=json.load(open(sys.argv[2])); assert checkpoints["checkpoints"][0]["state_hash"]; handoffs=json.load(open(sys.argv[3])); assert handoffs["handoffs"][0]["handoff_contract_hash"]; coordination=json.load(open(sys.argv[4])); assert coordination["mode"] == "parallel_expert_dag"' "$tmp/ledger.json" "$tmp/checkpoints.json" "$tmp/handoffs.json" "$tmp/coordination.json"
